sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111628" key="filtropoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιλτρο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n111628.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preparing love-charms,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
